experience.recommendation: His talents in the software development area are sterling. Mohamed worked well with our staff and got along well with everyone. He was first appointed as junior programmer, but considering his dedication and expertise at work, he was promoted to the post of senior programmer. He has thorough knowledge about advanced .NET and experience in enterprise application development. He is an excellent team member and works in coordination with rest of the team. He encourages other team members to achieve their targets. Mohamed has excellent communication skills and has the expertise to manage client calls. — Mohammed A. Elhussein, CEO (MSc Software Eng, UK)
